title: vicia ervilia
intro: Vicia ervilia, also known as bitter vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Vicia ervilia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Vicia ervilia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
